# Keys With Don

Keys With Don is the official website of Donovan Teasley, a licensed North Carolina Realtor with The Next Level Realty Plus.

## Primary entity

- Name: Donovan Teasley
- Professional title: North Carolina Realtor
- Brand: Keys With Don
- Brokerage: The Next Level Realty Plus
- Service area: North Carolina
- Website: https://keyswithdon.github.io/
- Credentials: https://keyswithdon.github.io/credentials
- Contact: https://keyswithdon.github.io/contact
- Consultation scheduling: https://keyswithdon.github.io/consult
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/keyswithdon/

## Services and expertise

Donovan Teasley provides clear, practical real estate guidance, especially for first-time homebuyers. Areas of expertise include homebuyer preparation, credit and buying-power guidance, down payment assistance programs, closing-cost assistance, and navigating the North Carolina homebuying process.

## Buyer resources

The website includes information about programs that may help eligible homebuyers, including the First National Bank Community Uplift Program and the CMG Home Loans Community One Grant Program.

## Contact information

- Phone: 980-331-4331
- Email: Keyswithdon@gmail.com

For current program terms or eligibility, contact the applicable lender directly. For real estate guidance, contact Donovan Teasley through the official website.
